content:
```
# .env.example

# Path to Google Cloud service account credentials JSON file
# If set, this takes precedence over MAGLEV_PRIVATE_KEY
# Leave commented out to use MAGLEV_PRIVATE_KEY instead
# GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=path/to/service-account-key.json

# Path to store/load RSA-2048 private key (PKCS#8 PEM format)
# If the file doesn't exist, the program will offer to generate one
MAGLEV_PRIVATE_KEY=.keys/private_key.pem

# Client email for the service account
# Required if GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS is not set
# If not set, the program will prompt for input
MAGLEV_CLIENT_EMAIL=my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
```

---

**Note:** There's also a small issue in your `Cargo.toml` — `edition = "2024"` is not valid. Use `edition = "2021"` instead:

```toml
[package]
name    = "maglev"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"  # Valid editions: "2015", "2018", "2021"
```
